name: Missed work after injury, AI value estimate wrong—claim value in Seattle?
description: Real docs set value—AI estimates useless.[1]

mainEntity.name: Missed work after injury, AI value estimate wrong—claim value in Seattle?

acceptedAnswer.text: Real docs set value—AI estimates useless.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Lost wages provable; ignore AI.[1] WA med negligence 3-yr.

**Key factors:**
- Pay stubs/employer letter.
- AI inflated expectations harm.
- Total offsets.

Calc real: wages x time. Lawyer settles fair.[1] Evidence-based.
